category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Gaze as watching files and running commands after edits.
source_facts.description says Execute commands for you.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gaze; official README title is Gaze: Save & Run.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface with quick start, usage, configuration, and options.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/wtetsu/gaze, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README documents automatic command execution on file changes.
Official README topics include file-watchers and command-line-tool.
